hypothesis: Conditioning CompGen on explicit active-site motif labels and the mean adsorbate–first-shell atom distances, in addition to S, E, and L, will reduce the Fréchet Distance between generated and real CIAE latent embeddings on HEA test sets by at least 20% and reduce compositional leakage by at least 10% compared with the original CompGen conditioned only on S, E, and L.
